title: skill or tech stack
content: Languages: JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, HTML/CSS, C/C++, C#. Frontend: React (Redux/Context), Next.js, React Native (Expo), Vue3 (Pinia), Tailwind CSS. Backend & Database: Node.js, Express.js, Nest.js, FastAPI, RESTful APIs, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, MySQL, Supabase (Vector Database). Tools & DevOps: AWS S3, Docker, Jenkins, GitHub Actions, Vercel, Vite, Webpack, Linux. Specialized Libs: Babylon.js (3D), LangChain (AI/RAG), Vercel AI SDK, Shadcn UI, Ant Design.

title: work experience
content: Software Developer (Frontend/Mobile) at Alpha Pay (Richmond, BC): Architected React Native apps with Redux Toolkit, integrated multi-region routing (USD/CAD), and built CI/CD pipelines with Expo EAS. Software Developer at Ulala Technologies (Delta, BC): Optimized Vue 3 data architecture for 100K+ records and bridged AWS S3 with pre-signed URLs. Full-Stack Developer at NYIT (Vancouver): Engineered an AI campus assistant using LangChain, RAG, and Supabase. Frontend Developer at Cognizant (Shanghai): Developed 3D industrial interfaces using Babylon.js and integrated real-time IoT telemetry via WebSockets.

title: education
content: Master of Science in Cybersecurity from New York Institute of Technology (Vancouver, 2023-2024); Bachelor of Engineering in Software Engineering from Sanda University (Shanghai, 2018-2022).

title: projects
content: MoodTrack: A full-stack AI-powered mood tracking platform using React, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, and Google Gemini API. Features include real-time AI report streaming via SSE, Vercel AI SDK integration, and anonymous community modules. AI Campus Assistant: RAG-based chatbot using LangChain and Supabase to reduce manual registrar inquiries by 30%.

content: Full-Stack developer with a Master's in Cybersecurity and 3+ years of experience across Canada and Asia. Expert in React, Vue 3, and AI-driven applications (RAG). Legally authorized to work in Canada (Open Work Permit valid until Jan 2028).

title: introduce yourself
content: When asked to introduce myself: I am Jacky Feng, a Full-Stack Developer and Frontend & Mobile Specialist based in Vancouver, BC. I have a Master's in Cybersecurity and 3+ years of experience across Canada and Asia, with expertise in React, Vue 3, and AI-driven applications. I am legally authorized to work in Canada. Happy to connect—you can reach me via email, LinkedIn, or GitHub.
